title: Tedium-Free RPG
note:
"The Adventurer"
"The Lone Wolf"
"Wolfpunk"
"Dimensions of Solitude"
Sci Fi Fantasy based in a small star system
Emphasise isolation, rare epic battle and treasure
Survival system with aging, caloric energy, resurrection
Offline adventure with online custom trading based on time 
Permanent asset additions with vetting system
Space-flight (mechanical or biological) end goal.
Evolutiona and time mechanics
Escape or save a dying planet
Rocketship engine sustains planet core
Balance 3 elements to harness a singular energy resource fueling magic, machine and organisms
Spiritial, mechanical, biological elements
Emphasise balance of elements
Natural proclivity system based on activities.  
Auto "leveling"

 over a large timescale
Physical inventory
Avoid common monsters
No economy
Enemies require correct weapon balance to
 defeat
Trap and harvest or hack and slash lowly enemies for resourced or labor
Atomizer tool for reclaiming Reusable-
Elements (RE-balancer)
"Elemental Solitude"
Each planet is an exteme of an element and must be balanced against The Core
Creatures, Spirits and Machines
Plasmas, Materials, Nanoware
Build intelligent systems to harvest resources
Interdimensiinal AI remote communucation as guidance
Seek out beauty and knowledge and victory to maintain emotional integrity
Androgen protagonist with shifting polarities (active/destructive and passive/nurturing
Telepotation for inventory and travel
Elements can be converted with sum energy loss.  Energy loss strengthens interplanetary imbalance as it retreats to elemental planets
Ongoing goal of balancing planet system of The Core and increasing its power by redirecting energy from orbitting bodies (Parasitic Planets)
Ship AI delays dying planet using Drive Core
Planets and player grow in power symbiotically.  Personal balance analagous to planetary balance.
Entropy system
Everything is useful and has a hidden purpose apart from providing elemental materials
AI becomes more powerful, corrupt and autonomous over time due to virus contracted on mechanical planet
Permadeath mechanic defines time frame for time travel after first death.  Branching dimensions.  Can change past and present by extension but not post death future
Trust mechanic as AI slowly begins to sabotage player.  
Different branching storylines based on which planet reached first with 3 possible end bosses
3 deaths for each element before annihilation
Tolerance system to discourage reliance on particular elements
Trust and paranoia/sanity system
Abandoned artificial star system.  Planetary core uses same fuel as starship

title: Ideas
note:
A small keyboard. Mounted to.the front of my guitar would allow m


Thougt I had an epiphany this morning.   COuld see how Infinitel realities could be interwoven based on our choices.  Though the fact of their intimate proximity would allow them to be cohesively guided I. A singular fashion.  To control. The way we have reacted to previous reality datum determi.es to an extent how we wil coninue to react, hence the value of conditioning.  The separation between the realities would see to be a matter of vibrational planes similar to colors or octaves, affecting eachother with their overtones and undertones.  To acheive freedom is then a matter of choice.  In this scenario heaven is freedom from physical impulse and emotional reaction; and hell is slavery to it.
